title: Extend proposal linkage truth across non-proposal inspectors
summary: Share proposal read-back and current-delta truth across content, foundation, and navigation inspectors instead of limiting it to the proposal workspace surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: Shared proposal support exposes reusable read-back, source-audit, and current-delta truth helpers that do not live only behind the proposal detail panel.
At least content, foundation, and navigation inspectors outside the proposal workspace use the shared proposal linkage truth summaries.
The updated inspector summaries surface current-delta and source-audit truth, not only raw proposal counts.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Shared proposal support now exposes reusable read-back, source-audit, and current-delta truth helpers instead of keeping that logic only behind the proposal artifact detail panel.

Content, foundation, and navigation inspectors now reuse the shared proposal linkage truth summaries, so their proposal linkage sections surface source-audit and current-delta signal instead of only raw proposal counts.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after expanding proposal linkage truth across non-proposal inspectors.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build succeeded after the shared proposal truth refactor.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0032: connect proposal artifact read-back and current-delta truth into inspectors outside proposal workspace.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Initial inspection started in the root checkout before lane preparation; move the implementation into a lane-backed branch before commit and restore the root checkout to clean main.
Prefer shared proposal truth helpers over per-inspector copy-paste.
